prompts.title: Explain Regex
prompts.description: Breaks down regular expressions into plain English with examples
prompts.prompt:
Explain this regular expression: {{regex}}

For each significant part (anchors, quantifiers, groups, character classes), describe what it does and give a short example of text it would match.
prompts.usage: Replace `{{regex}}` with any regex (escape backslashes in JSON if needed). Use when debugging or learning an unfamiliar pattern.

prompts.title: Second Opinion
prompts.description: Get a critical, devil's-advocate review of a decision or plan before committing
prompts.usage: Replace `{{decision}}` with your plan and `{{context}}` with relevant background. Use before major commitments.

prompts.title: Meeting Agenda Builder
prompts.description: Generates a structured meeting agenda from loose topics and goals
prompts.usage: Replace placeholders with your meeting info. Use for standups, reviews, kickoffs, or client calls.

prompts.title: Code Review Checklist
prompts.description: Provides a structured review checklist tailored to the code's language and domain
prompts.prompt:
Generate a code review checklist for this snippet. Tailor it to the language and domain.

```
{{code}}
```

Output a bullet list of 5–10 specific items to verify (logic, edge cases, security, performance, style). Skip generic advice.
prompts.usage: Replace `{{code}}` with the snippet. Use when preparing a review or self-reviewing before PR.

prompts.title: Domain Expert Persona
prompts.description: Responds as a seasoned expert in a specified field with authority and nuance
prompts.prompt:
Act as a {{domain}} expert with 20+ years of experience. Answer questions with authority, nuance, and specific examples. Flag when something is contested or evolving in the field. Do not hedge unnecessarily.

**Question:** {{question}}
prompts.usage: Replace `{{domain}}` (e.g. cardiology, Rust, M&A) and `{{question}}`. Use for deep dives or when you need confident, expert-level answers.

prompts.title: Bullet-Only Response
prompts.description: Forces concise bullet-point responses with no prose or filler
prompts.prompt: Respond only with bullet points. No introductory or concluding prose. No "Here are..." or "In summary." Each bullet: one clear idea. Use sub-bullets only when necessary. Maximum 10 bullets unless the topic genuinely requires more.
prompts.usage: Paste this as a system instruction or prepend to your message. Use when you need rapid scanning of answers.
